languages.text: {n}Ульфар издает короткий рык.{/n} "Не будь этот меч получен из рук достойного мужа, я бы подумал, что передо мной очередная поделка ксеносов". {n}Он неодобрительно оскаливается, рассматривая сияющую кромку.{/n} "Нет надежности в стали, что выкована из чужацкого лукавства, эттфатер".

{n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."
languages.original_text: {n}Ульфар издает короткий рык.{/n} "Не будь этот меч получен из рук достойного мужа, я бы подумал, что передо мной очередная поделка ксеносов". {n}Он неодобрительно оскаливается, рассматривая сияющую кромку.{/n} "Нет надежности в стали, что выкована из чужацкого лукавства, эттфатер".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

{n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

{n}Ulfar's eyes flash with joy.{/n} "The Allfather sees, this is a fine weapon! It is not fit to lie in its scabbard and await its destined hour. Rest assured, watcher, I will use it to lop off the head of any iron creature that crosses my path."

{n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

{n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

languages.text: {n}ウルファルの目は喜びに満ちて輝いた。{/n}「全なる父が見ている。これは素晴らしい武器だ！鞘に収めて運命の刻を待つにはふさわしくない。心配するな、見守る者よ。私はこの武器を使って、私の道に立ちはだかる鉄の生き物を斬り落とす。」
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's eyes flash with joy.{/n} "The Allfather sees, this is a fine weapon! It is not fit to lie in its scabbard and await its destined hour. Rest assured, watcher, I will use it to lop off the head of any iron creature that crosses my path."

traits.locale_text: ウルファルの目は喜びに満ちて輝いた。「全なる父が見ている。これは素晴らしい武器だ！鞘に収めて運命の刻を待つにはふさわしくない。心配するな、見守る者よ。私はこの武器を使って、私の道に立ちはだかる鉄の生き物を斬り落とす。」

languages.text: {n}Ulfar suelta un breve gruñido.{/n} «Si no fuera el regalo de un guerrero honorable, creería que es otra falsificación xenos». {n}Enseña los dientes con desprecio y examina el brillo luminoso del arma.{/n} «No hay garantías en el acero forjado con artimañas xenos, Aett-Vater».
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar suelta un breve gruñido.{/n} «Si no fuera el regalo de un guerrero honorable, creería que es otra falsificación xenos». {n}Enseña los dientes con desprecio y examina el brillo luminoso del arma.{/n} «No hay garantías en el acero forjado con artimañas xenos, Aett-Vater».

languages.text: {n}Ulfar stößt ein kurzes Knurren aus.{/n} "Wäre dies nicht ein Geschenk aus den Händen eines ehrenhaften Kriegers, hielte ich es für eine weitere Täuschung der Xenos." {n}Er entblößt missbilligend seine Zähne, während er die schimmernde Klinge der Waffe untersucht.{/n} "Von listenreichen Xenos geschmiedeter Stahl birgt keinerlei Sicherheit, Aett-Vater."
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar stößt ein kurzes Knurren aus.{/n} "Wäre dies nicht ein Geschenk aus den Händen eines ehrenhaften Kriegers, hielte ich es für eine weitere Täuschung der Xenos." {n}Er entblößt missbilligend seine Zähne, während er die schimmernde Klinge der Waffe untersucht.{/n} "Von listenreichen Xenos geschmiedeter Stahl birgt keinerlei Sicherheit, Aett-Vater."

languages.text: {n}Ulfar laisse échapper un bref grognement.{/n} « Si elle ne nous était pas confiée par un honorable guerrier, j'aurais pensé qu'il s'agissait encore d'une grossière copie réalisée par un xénos. » {n}Sa bouche s'étire en un rictus tandis qu'il examine la lame luisante.{/n} « Un acier de qualité ne peut être forgé par de fourbes xénos, Aett-Vater. »
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar laisse échapper un bref grognement.{/n} « Si elle ne nous était pas confiée par un honorable guerrier, j'aurais pensé qu'il s'agissait encore d'une grossière copie réalisée par un xénos. » {n}Sa bouche s'étire en un rictus tandis qu'il examine la lame luisante.{/n} « Un acier de qualité ne peut être forgé par de fourbes xénos, Aett-Vater. »

languages.text: {n}乌尔法发出一声短促的低吼。{/n}“要不是这是一位荣耀的战士赠予的礼物，我会以为这又是异形造的赝品。”{n}他一边端详那武器泛光的剑刃，一边不以为然地龇了龇牙。{/n}“用异形诡计打造的钢铁，不值得信任，狼领。”
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."

traits.locale_text: {n}乌尔法发出一声短促的低吼。{/n}“要不是这是一位荣耀的战士赠予的礼物，我会以为这又是异形造的赝品。”{n}他一边端详那武器泛光的剑刃，一边不以为然地龇了龇牙。{/n}“用异形诡计打造的钢铁，不值得信任，狼领。”

languages.text: {n}Ulfar, kısa bir hırıltı çıkarıyor.{/n} "Bu onurlu bir savaşçının elinden verilmiş bir armağan olmasaydı bunun zeno yapımı başka bir sahte eşya olduğunu düşünürdüm." {n}Silahın parlayan ucunu incelerken memnuniyetsizlikle dişlerini gösteriyor.{/n} "Zeno kurnazlığıyla dövülmüş çelikte hiçbir güvence yoktur Aett-Vater."
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar lets out a short growl.{/n} "Were this not a gift from the hands of an honourable warrior, I would think this another xenos-made fake." {n}He bares his teeth in disapproval as he examines the weapon's glowing edge.{/n} "There is no surety in steel forged from xenos cunning, Aett-Vater."
